title: Pickup and laydown station systems for grow tower production
abstract: An apparatus for releasably grasping a grow tower. The apparatus comprising a beam, gripper assemblies attached to opposite ends of the beam and an actuator mechanism for controlling the gripper assemblies.
claims: 1. An apparatus for releasably grasping a grow tower, comprising a beam; and first and second gripper assemblies attached to respective opposite ends of the beam, wherein each of the first and second gripper assemblies comprises a first arm having a substantially L-shaped configuration and a first grip element at a distal end thereof; a second static arm having a substantially L-shaped configuration and a second grip element at a distal end thereof; and an actuator mechanism for moving the first arm between an open position and a closed position, wherein in the closed position, the first and second grip elements are configured to engage respective opposing grooves of a grow tower.
